title: Xtremeauto Nitrile Gloves - Disposable Gloves, Diamond Grip Orange Gloves - Powder-free & Latex Free Nitrile Gloves, Extra Thick & Strong Rubber Gloves Mechanics Gloves (1 Box, Extra Large)
features: Xtremeauto Mechanics Gloves, Excellent Grip & Dexterity - The Xtremeauto nitrile disposable gloves feature a unique raised diamond texture, allowing for amazing grip even in greasy conditions.

Powder & Latex Free Glove - Our professional gloves do not include powder or latex, reducing skin irritation risk. Perfectly suited for mechanic & tattoo artists as the diamond texture allows for a strong grip.
Touch Screen Friendly - Our protective gloves are touch-screen friendly, allowing you to use your phone or tablet while using our heavy duty gloves.
Suitable For A Wide Range Of Applications - Our powder free gloves are perfect for agricultural use, medical, catering, mechanics and general use.
Multi-purpose Disposable Gloves - Dexterity level rating of 5, these gloves are a perfect fit and offer a perfect balance of comfort, protection and grip.
